_instructions: Copy this file, remove this field, and fill in the fields marked REQUIRED. Fields marked OPTIONAL may be omitted if not applicable. Cross-references: primitive_id must match T1 IDs (DP/MPC/HE/ZKP/SYN/FL/TEE/TRE); pairing_ref must match T2 IDs (P-01 to P-08); stack_ref must match T3 IDs (S-01 to S-04); sector_ref must match T4 IDs.
title: REQUIRED — short descriptive name

architecture_pattern.pairing_ref: OPTIONAL — T2 Pair ID e.g. P-01
architecture_pattern.stack_ref: OPTIONAL — T3 Stack ID e.g. S-01

pet_components._comment: Add one object per PET primitive. Remove _comment field.
pet_components.role: REQUIRED — what this primitive contributes to the architecture
pet_components.implementation_status: REQUIRED — one of: planned / in-development / deployed / deprecated

parameters.OPTIONAL: key parameters relevant to assurance — e.g. epsilon/delta for DP, vendor for TEE

pet_components.parameter_notes: OPTIONAL — narrative on parameter choices or governance gaps

trust_model.summary: REQUIRED — narrative description of the overall trust model

threat_actors.capability: REQUIRED — what they can observe or do
threat_actors.mitigated_by: REQUIRED — which PET component(s) address this

required_artefacts.artefact: REQUIRED — artefact name (e.g. 'privacy accountant and parameter manifest')
required_artefacts.status: REQUIRED — one of: exists / planned / not-applicable / missing
required_artefacts.location: OPTIONAL — where the artefact can be found

assurance_targets.maturity_justification: OPTIONAL — why this stage was assigned

governance_controls.output_control: OPTIONAL — one of: human-review / automated-statistical / both / none / planned

frameworks_applied.framework: OPTIONAL — e.g. Five Safes / NIST Privacy Framework 1.0 / ISO/IEC 27701
frameworks_applied.alignment_level: OPTIONAL — one of: full / partial / aspirational / not-assessed

deployment_context.sector_ref: REQUIRED — one of: public_sector / healthcare / finance / technology / web3
deployment_context.scale: OPTIONAL — one of: pilot / limited-production / production / platform-scale

applicable_regulations.regulation: OPTIONAL — e.g. UK GDPR / EU GDPR / HIPAA / CCPA
applicable_regulations.alignment_status: OPTIONAL — one of: aligned / partial / gap-identified / not-assessed

standards_alignment.standard: OPTIONAL — e.g. NIST SP 800-226 / ICO PETs Guidance 2023 / ISO/IEC 20889:2018
standards_alignment.alignment_level: OPTIONAL — one of: full / partial / aspirational / not-assessed

tooling_candidates.name: OPTIONAL
primitive_ids: OPTIONAL — T1 IDs this tool supports
tooling_candidates.maturity: OPTIONAL — one of: experimental / production / deprecated

residual_risks.severity: OPTIONAL — one of: low / medium / high / critical
